offer: For logistics carriers processing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient scheduling causes late deliveries. We provide a fleet management system instead of manual tracking and scheduling via spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient scheduling of vehicle maintenance and route optimization.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where logistics carriers seek help
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar scheduling issues
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Community forums for logistics carriers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try scheduling and optimization tools on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick use
Set default reminder schedules for maintenance
Allow CSV import for existing vehicle data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps required in user onboarding
